paths.name: @/lib/playbook/queries
paths.message: published-articles is a lightweight catalog read — do not import queries (pulls next/headers).

paths.name: @/lib/playbook/server-queries
paths.message: published-articles must not import server-queries (pulls react cache and queries).

paths.name: @/lib/playbook/article-sections
paths.message: published-articles must not import article-sections (pulls isomorphic-dompurify).

paths.name: @/lib/supabase/server
paths.message: published-articles uses anon Supabase only — do not import supabase/server.

paths.name: @/lib/pipeline/publishTarget
paths.message: publishTarget is write-only — keep reads in published-articles.

paths.name: @/lib/pipeline/publishTarget
paths.message: Use @/lib/playbook/published-articles for catalog reads. publishTarget loads article-sections at module init.
